name: account-manager
author: hagency
description: Manage sub-accounts under the current profile

tools.name: manage_account
tools.description: Manage sub-accounts under the current profile. Sub-accounts share the parent's LLM provider and API keys but have their own data directory, memory, skills, and messaging channels. Supports creating, updating, listing, deleting, starting, stopping, and restarting sub-accounts.

action.description: Action to perform. 'update' changes config on an existing sub-account. 'start'/'stop' enable/disable the gateway. 'restart' restarts a running gateway.

name.description: Display name for the sub-account (required for 'create', optional for 'update'/'info' to resolve ID).

sub_account_id.description: ID of the sub-account (required for 'update', 'delete', 'info', 'start', 'stop', 'restart'). Format: parent-id--slug, e.g. 'dspfac--work-bot'.

system_prompt.description: System prompt for the sub-account. Used with 'create' or 'update'. Set to empty string to clear.

telegram_token.description: Telegram bot token. Used with 'create' or 'update' to add/replace a Telegram channel.

telegram_senders.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Used with 'update' to restrict access. Example: '5460262597,123456789'.

whatsapp.description: Enable (true) or disable (false) WhatsApp channel. Used with 'update'.

feishu_app_id.description: Feishu/Lark app ID. Used with 'update' to add/configure a Feishu channel.

feishu_app_secret.description: Feishu/Lark app secret. Used with 'update' to add/configure a Feishu channel.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the sub-account. Used with 'update'. For convenience, use 'start'/'stop' actions instead.

enable.description: Whether to auto-enable the sub-account after creation. Default: false. Only used with 'create'.
